title: Better PVP Stone
description: This resource pack changes the way stone and deepslate looks
body:
⚔️ Clean CPvP Texture Pack ⚔️

A competitive-focused texture pack designed for Crystal PvP players who want maximum visibility and less visual distraction. 🪨✨
All ores and deepslate blocks have been unified into a clean, consistent style to make terrain easier to read and fights smoother during intense battles.

🔥 Features:

Cleaner stone textures for better visibility
All ores look identical 👀
Deepslate matches normal stone 🖤➡️🩶
Reduced visual clutter for smoother CPvP gameplay
Simple, clean, and performance-friendly style ⚡

Perfect for Crystal PvP, SMPs, and players who prefer a minimalistic competitive look. 🏆
